---
title: "Mid Sem Practice"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
y <- 1:10
y
z <- seq(0,10, by=2)
z
```

```{r}
x <- c(2,4,6,8,10)
x[3]
x[c(2,4)]
x[x>5]
```

#df

```{r}
df <- data.frame(
  name = c("A","B","C","D"),
  age = c(20,22,19,21),
  marks = c(75,80,65,90)
)
```

```{r}
df$age
df[df$marks > 70, ]
```

```{r}
df["age"]
```

```{r}
df$age
```

```{r}
class(df$age)
```

```{r}
class(df["age"])
```

```{r}
x <- c(1,2,3)
y <- c(4,5)
x + y
```


```{r}
x <- list(a=1, b=2)
class(x)
```

```{r}
mean(c(1,2,NA,4))
```

```{r}
pnorm(1.96)
```

```{r}
x <- c(2,4,6,8)
mean(x > 4)
```

```{r}
x <- c(1,2,3)
y <- c(10,20,30)
tapply(y, x %% 2, mean)
```

```{r}
logFC <- rnorm(100)
pval <- runif(100)

plot(logFC, -log10(pval),
     pch=20,
     main="Volcano Plot")
```

```{r}
x <- rnorm(100)
y1 <- rnorm(100)
y2 <- rnorm(100)

plot(x, y1, col="red")
points(x, y2, col="blue")
```
